component.name: homeplanr
component.summary: Draw floor plans in 2D, furnish them, and view in 3D

description.p: homeplanr is a home planning app: draw walls, doors and windows on a 2D floor plan, furnish rooms from a built-in catalog, and walk through the result in 3D. Plans export to PNG, SVG and true-vector PDF.

ul.li: 2D editor with snapping, measuring, dimensions and annotations
3D view with camera presets and first-person walk mode
Furniture catalog with 35+ procedurally drawn items
Per-side wall paint, floor finishes, dark mode, metric and imperial units
Native .homeplanr project files with crash recovery
